spec.description: Outcome of the Spotify API fallback inside SubmitUrlScrobble. `enriched` = row was updated with spotify_id; `no_db_match` = no fmbot track to attach to; `spotify_api_miss` = Spotify API returned nothing; `incomplete_spotify_data` = returned track lacked artist/name.
